data.content:
Follow-up implementation after review rejection: updateKnot() no longer forwards any note or handoff identity flags. Foolery now sends identity fields only during lease creation; claim, poll, update, notes, and handoff capsules all avoid passing agent or username metadata through Knots commands. The lease-derived display normalization and shipped-step fallback from the earlier implementation remain in place.

Validation on commit dc931030fa15: bun run lint (0 errors, warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
